title: Junior Instructional Designer at NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates family as a Instructional Designer in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates:
NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates!
